captureScope: Public attendee-facing event facts only; checkout fields, transient page tokens, host account identifiers, and unrelated platform markup intentionally excluded.

facts.title: 2026 EdFuture Summit
facts.summary: A two-day summit where education, industry, and community come together to shape the future of learning AI.

includes: digital materials and resources after the summit

knownConflicts: The Humanitix event header/schema ends the overall event at 4pm on July 22, while description copy says Day 2 runs to 5pm.
The Day 1 overview says 8am–3pm, while the supplied program image includes a 3:10pm session and no end time.
The page says both 'Register today' and 'Sales have stopped'; the guide links to the official page without claiming tickets are available.
